subHeadings.chat: Chat with your AI buddy assistant

config.edited: Buddy configuration has been successfully updated

errors.providerUnavailable: The AI provider is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

name.title: Buddy name
name.description: The name displayed in the panel chat header

sttApiKey.title: STT API Key
sttApiKey.placeholder: Enter your OpenAI API key for Whisper

ttsPlugin.title: TTS Plugin
ttsPlugin.placeholder: Enter TTS plugin type or none
ttsPlugin.description: Enter the TTS plugin type (e.g., buddy-openai-plugin, buddy-elevenlabs-plugin, buddy-system-tts-plugin) or 'none' to disable

texts.aboutBuddy: Configure the AI buddy assistant that observes your actions, learns your patterns, and suggests automations. Select an AI provider plugin to enable chat functionality. Provider-specific settings (API key, model) are configured in the plugin's own settings page. Without a provider, rule-based suggestions will still work.
texts.pluginConfigHint: API keys, model names, and other provider-specific settings are configured in the selected plugin's settings page.
texts.emptyChat: Select or create a conversation to start chatting
texts.startConversation: Ask me anything about your home!
texts.providerNotConfiguredHint: Configure an AI provider plugin to start chatting with your buddy.
texts.noProviderSelectedHint: Go to settings to select and configure an AI provider.
texts.providerNotEnabledHint: Enable it in the plugin configuration.
texts.providerMissingConfigHint: Set up the required API key or OAuth connection.
texts.providersFetchFailed: Failed to load available providers. The provider list may be incomplete.
texts.moduleDisabledHint: The AI buddy module is currently disabled. Enable it in the system configuration to use chat and suggestions.
